mapper.select: SELECT SKILL_NAME FROM SKILL WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SKILL_NAME
SELECT MIN(SKILL_ID) FROM SKILL WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND UPPER(TRIM(SKILL_NAME)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{skillName}))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SKILL ( SKILL_ID, SKILL_NAME, PARENT_SKILL_ID, SKILL_TYPE, USE_YN ) VALUES ( SKILL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{skillName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NULL, #{skillType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y' )

INSERT INTO CHAPTER_SKILL ( CHAPTER_SKILL_ID, CHAPTER_ID, SKILL_ID, WEIGHT, COVERAGE_LEVEL, COVERAGE_REASON ) VALUES ( CHAPTER_SKILL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{chapterId}, #{skillId}, #{weight}, #{coverageLevel}, #{coverageReason} )
